ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
libboost_devel:
- '1.86'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
root_base:
- 6.36.8
root_cxx_standard:
- '20'
target_platform:
- linux-64
tbb_devel:
- '2022'
xerces_c:
- '3.3'
zip_keys:
- - root_base
  - root_cxx_standard

about.description:
DD4hep is a software framework for providing a complete solution for
full detector description (geometry, materials, visualization, readout,
alignment, calibration, etc.) for high energy physics experiments.
It uses the ROOT geometry package and adds support for detector
alignment, conditions, and simulation with Geant4.
about.summary: Detector Description Toolkit for High Energy Physics

build.script:
mkdir -p build
cd build
cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
    -GNinja \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=$PREFIX \
    -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
    -DDD4HEP_USE_GEANT4=ON \
    -DDD4HEP_USE_XERCESC=ON \
    -DDD4HEP_BUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF \
    -DDD4HEP_RELAX_PYVER=ON \
    -DPython_EXECUTABLE=$PYTHON \
    -DPython_ROOT_DIR=$PREFIX \
    -DPython_FIND_STRATEGY=LOCATION \
    $SRC_DIR
cmake --build . --target install

name: dd4hep

about.description:
DD4hep is a software framework for providing a complete solution for
full detector description (geometry, materials, visualization, readout,
alignment, calibration, etc.) for high energy physics experiments.
It uses the ROOT geometry package and adds support for detector
alignment, conditions, and simulation with Geant4.
about.summary: Detector Description Toolkit for High Energy Physics

build.script:
mkdir -p build
cd build
cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
    -GNinja \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=$PREFIX \
    -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
    -DDD4HEP_USE_GEANT4=ON \
    -DDD4HEP_USE_XERCESC=ON \

raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  name: dd4hep
  version: "1.34"
  tag: v01-34

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/AIDASoft/DD4hep/archive/refs/tags/${{ tag }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 1c121f4b3eb14d104b7a7f734e7e52efc4b6e4e5bc74d21d5d2de1b91c8f9f75
  patches:
    - patches/0001-fix-auto-detect-C-standard-from-ROOT-if-not-explicit.patch
    - patches/0002-fix-remove-overly-conservative-Geant4-C-standard-che.patch
    - patches/0003-fix-preload-libpython-when-running-listcomponents-on.patch
    - patches/0004-fix-auto-detect-plugin-search-path-at-runtime.patch
    - patches/0005-fix-auto-detect-DD4hepINSTALL-at-runtime.patch
    - patches/0006-fix-remove-DD4HEP_LIBRARY_PATH-requirement-from-Pyth.patch

build:
  number: 0
  skip:
    - win
  script:
    - if: osx
      then: export CXXFLAGS="${CXXFLAGS} -D_LIBCPP_DISABLE_AVAILABILITY"
    - |
      mkdir -p build
      cd build
      cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} \
          -GNinja \
          -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
          -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=$PREFIX \
          -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
          -DDD4HEP_USE_GEANT4=ON \
          -DDD4HEP_USE_XERCESC=ON \
          -DDD4HEP_BUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF \
          -DDD4HEP_RELAX_PYVER=ON \
          -DPython_EXECUTABLE=$PYTHON \
          -DPython_ROOT_DIR=$PREFIX \
          -DPython_FIND_STRATEGY=LOCATION \
          $SRC_DIR
      cmake --build . --target install

requirements:
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage(name, upper_bound="x.x.x") }}
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - cmake
    - ninja
    - git
  host:
    - python
    - libboost-devel
    - root_base
    - root_cxx_standard
    - geant4
    - xerces-c
    - tbb-devel
  run:
    - python

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - dd4hep
      pip_check: false
  - script:
      - ddsim --help

about:
  homepage: https://dd4hep.web.cern.ch/dd4hep/
  license: LGPL-3.0-or-later
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Detector Description Toolkit for High Energy Physics
  description: |
    DD4hep is a software framework for providing a complete solution for
    full detector description (geometry, materials, visualization, readout,
    alignment, calibration, etc.) for high energy physics experiments.
    It uses the ROOT geometry package and adds support for detector
    alignment, conditions, and simulation with Geant4.
  documentation: https://dd4hep.web.cern.ch/dd4hep/
  repository: https://github.com/AIDASoft/DD4hep

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - chrisburr
